name: kyegomez/OpenMythos
description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.

name: Manavarya09/design-extract
description: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+.

name: BuilderPulse/BuilderPulse
description: AI-powered daily intelligence for indie hackers and builders. 20 questions, 10+ sources, every morning.

name: bergside/design-md-chrome
description: Chrome extension to extract styles from any website and generate DESIGN.md files and design skills for AI based on TypeUI

name: AIScientists-Dev/WorldSeed
description: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously — physical rules, information asymmetry, any agent can plug in. Define scenarios in YAML, watch stories emerge.

name: humanrouter/ddtree-mlx
description: Tree-based speculative decoding for Apple Silicon (MLX). ~10-15% faster than DFlash on code, ~1.5x over autoregressive. First MLX port with custom Metal kernels for hybrid model support.

name: yzhao062/agent-style
description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.

name: cablate/llm-atomic-wiki
description: An extension of Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern: atom layer, topic-branches, two-layer Lint. Distilled from running the pattern end-to-end.

name: guo2001china/35gateway
description: 35m.ai 旗下源码开放 AI Gateway，文本/图片/视频/音频/音乐一键接入，支持多供应商智能路由与自带 Key 混合使用，不浪费每一份算力。 Source-available AI gateway from 35m.ai for text, image, video, audio, and music. Supports smart multi-provider   routing and bring-your-own-key workflows without wasting compute.

name: MatthewK78/Rose
description: 🌹 Rose: Range-Of-Slice Equilibration PyTorch optimizer. Stateless optimization through range-normalized gradient updates.

name: videlalvaro/emilio
description: Transformer inference via unconventional compute: a single algebraic primitive, a tag-system scheduler, and Apple's Neural Engine through convolution.

name: Arnav-Singh-5080/Ai-Credit-Intelligence-Engine
description: A smart AI-driven platform for credit risk analysis, enabling accurate loan eligibility prediction and data-driven financial decision-making.

name: gryszzz/OpenThymos
description: Programmable Rust runtime framework for AI systems and LLMs. Interactive, agentic, and ledgered execution across models, tools, code, and real world workflows.

name: thanos/ex_datalog
description: A pure Elixir Datalog engine with semi-naive fixpoint evaluation, stratified negation, provenance tracking, and telemetry.

name: pleasedodisturb/awesome-llm-token-optimization
description: A curated list of strategies, tools, papers, and resources for reducing LLM token costs and improving efficiency in production.
